answer: task_shape=deterministic-sub-dag; executor=workflow as planning responsibility for shared schema and deterministic fan-out/join. Codex does not provide the Claude Workflow runtime, so execution maps to origin-trackable Shell plus real cli-worker processes. Each implementation leaf has T1 floor, exact target qualification is fail-closed, fallback stays among qualified T1 targets, and each worker must have a real bind+link handle before in_flight. Runtime terminal only terminalizes the agent; after all leaves stop, the orchestrator performs the deterministic join and independent endpoint verification before parent done/verified.
